name: The words aladd al-khisam mean 'the most fierce in enmity'. This would apply to
introduction:
someone who concentrates all his energies on opposing truth, and who resorts to whatever
falsehood, dishonesty, treachery and breach of faith he thinks necessary to achieve his ends.
